profile_summary: AI Engineer and Solution Architect with hands-on experience in designing and deploying production-grade, end-to-end AI systems.[cite: 3] Proficient in Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, LLMs, RAG architectures, and Agentic AI automation using Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace Transformers, LangGraph, and FastAPI.[cite: 3] Skilled in model fine-tuning, REST API integration, and building scalable cloud infrastructure for complex workflows.[cite: 3] Specialized in multilingual low-resource NLP including Urdu-English language models.[cite: 3] Currently pursuing a Bachelor's in Artificial Intelligence, driven to architect robust AI solutions for real-world problems.[cite: 3]

responsibilities: Architecting an Autonomous B2B Lead Generation AI Engine using LangGraph and FastAPI.[cite: 3]
Lead Scraper Agent: Built an AI agent to autonomously extract and validate targeted B2B leads from multiple web sources.[cite: 3]
Strategy & Copywriter Agent: Developed a secondary agent to analyze lead profiles, identify pain points, and generate hyper-personalized cold outreach copy.[cite: 3]
Outreach Automation (In Progress): Integrating a third agent to fully automate email workflows and pipeline execution.[cite: 3]
Designed and integrated a custom AI chatbot into a core Flutter mobile application for end users.[cite: 3]
Collaborated with the mobile development team to integrate ML models with the UI, ensuring a seamless conversational experience.[cite: 3]
Deployed REST APIs to connect the AI inference backend with the Flutter frontend for real-time responses.[cite: 3]
Developed and optimized machine learning models for real-world applications during an intensive remote internship.[cite: 3]
Built data-driven solutions and contributed to the architecture of innovative ML pipelines.[cite: 3]
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to research, prototype, and evaluate the performance of various AI models.[cite: 3]
Spearheaded AI automation initiatives, onboarding 3+ enterprise clients within the first month and delivering custom NLP solutions.[cite: 3]
Deployed Agentic AI workflows that eliminated approx. 10 hours/week of manual data entry, increasing client efficiency by 25%.[cite: 3]
Built custom chatbots using NLP libraries to handle customer support queries autonomously, reducing response time by 40%.[cite: 3]
Managed end-to-end development from client requirement gathering to deployment on cloud infrastructure.[cite: 3]

projects.name: Autonomous GTM AI Engine[cite: 3]
projects.overview: Engineered a distributed asynchronous Lead Discovery Pipeline utilizing concurrent.futures to scrape, validate, and deduplicate B2B leads across 7+ sources, bypassing WAFs via Playwright Stealth.[cite: 3]
projects.challenge: Ensuring 100% data retention and non-blocking API performance under heavy processing loads.[cite: 3]
projects.solution: Architected an event-driven automation bridge using Redis and Celery workers for background task queuing, and designed a multi-agent LangGraph state machine (Researcher, Strategist, Copywriter) integrated with local LLMs (Ollama, Llama-3.2, Qwen-2.5).[cite: 3]
projects.tech_stack: LangGraph, Celery, Redis, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Playwright[cite: 3]
projects.architecture: Deployed a robust FastAPI backend with PostgreSQL (pgvector) to enforce state persistence, comprehensive audit logging, and a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) gateway for strict quality control.[cite: 3]
projects.results: Achieved intelligent profiling and hyper-personalized cold email generation.[cite: 3]

projects.name: Multimodal Agentic Sales AI[cite: 3]
projects.overview: Architected a strict 9-stage finite state machine using LangGraph to guarantee deterministic sales workflows and eliminate LLM hallucinations during negotiations.[cite: 3]
projects.challenge: Preventing repetitive data collection from returning users and handling complex multimodal inputs.[cite: 3]
projects.solution: Integrated GPT-4o Vision and Whisper API to process multimodal inputs (documents, voice) and built a pure-Python pricing engine ensuring 100% calculation accuracy.[cite: 3]
projects.architecture: Designed a hybrid memory architecture (Redis & MongoDB) for long-term context retention and deployed an asynchronous FastAPI backend.[cite: 3]
projects.results: Successfully deployed featuring Stripe payment integration and automated data synchronization with a custom CRM.[cite: 3]

projects.name: Multilingual Banking Chatbot[cite: 3]
projects.overview: Architected a dual-language (English & Urdu) NLP model architecture tailored for the banking sector.[cite: 3]
projects.challenge: Effectively eliminating hallucinations in financial query resolutions.[cite: 3]
projects.solution: Designed an intent-recognition and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline using Pinecone vector database to ground LLM responses in real-time financial context.[cite: 3]
projects.architecture: Deployed via REST API enabling real-time inference.[cite: 3]
projects.results: Trained on 8,000+ labeled Urdu/English banking queries across 20+ intent categories.[cite: 3]

projects.name: Multi-Agent AI Portfolio Assistant[cite: 3]
projects.overview: Architected a multi-agent semantic routing system to autonomously classify and dispatch user intents across specialized portfolio, greeting, and guardrail nodes.[cite: 3]
projects.challenge: Blocking prompt injections and reducing LLM inference costs for out-of-scope queries.[cite: 3]
projects.solution: Engineered zero-latency guardrails using Regex-based intent detection.[cite: 3]
projects.architecture: Deployed an asynchronous FastAPI backend featuring stateful conversation memory via PostgreSQL (Supabase).[cite: 3]
projects.results: Effectively blocked prompt injections, reduced LLM inference costs to $0 for out-of-scope queries, and ensured seamless, context-aware interactions in English and Roman Urdu.[cite: 3]

projects.name: Animal Species Detection AI[cite: 3]
projects.overview: Engineered a CNN achieving 94% accuracy across 90+ distinct animal species using Transfer Learning.[cite: 3]
projects.challenge: Serving real-time predictions efficiently to users.[cite: 3]
projects.solution: Integrated the model with a high-performance Next.js frontend to reduce latency.[cite: 3]
projects.architecture: Deployed the full-stack solution on Vercel and Hugging Face.[cite: 3]
